description: Fadi Ghandour discusses the evolution of Web3 and crypto at Binance Blockchain Week in Dubai, emphasizing the city's role in the global digital economy and the importance of early adoption in entrepreneurship.
topic_summary: At [t=10:48], Ghandour highlights Dubai's commitment to becoming a hub for Web3 and crypto. He shares his journey from traditional business to embracing blockchain technology, influenced by his son, Faris. Ghandour offers advice to startups in the MENA region, stressing the need for conviction and resilience in building businesses despite market challenges.
